name: Occupational Personality Questionnaire (OPQ)
description: The OPQ is the most powerful and widely used measure of behavioral style in the world. It provides a clear framework for understanding the impact of personality on job performance.

name: General Ability Tests (Verify GAT)
description: Assess candidates' numerical, deductive, and inductive reasoning skills to evaluate their general cognitive ability and problem-solving potential.

name: Coding Simulation Tests
description: Evaluate technical candidates with real-world coding challenges across multiple programming languages including Java, Python, and C++.

name: Situational Judgment Tests (SJT)
description: Evaluate how candidates respond to specific, job-relevant scenarios to assess their alignment with role requirements and company culture.
